Login.title: Login
Login.emailNotFound: Email not found in the system. Please ensure you are registered.
Login.otpSendError: Unable to send OTP. Please try again.
Login.otpSendSuccess: OTP sent to your email. Please check your inbox.
Login.otpSendNewSuccess: New OTP sent to your email.
Login.descriptionCredentials: Enter your email to receive a One-Time Password (OTP)
Login.descriptionOtp: Enter the OTP received via email

Register.title: Create an account
Register.description: Enter your details below to register
Register.emailExistsError: This email is already in use. Please go to the login page.
Register.registerSuccess: Registration successful! Please check your email inbox to verify your account.

Home.heroDescription: Modern Full-Stack project management system with Kanban, Passwordless Auth, Session Control, and more
Home.featuresDescription: Comprehensive features for task management, from Auth to Drag & Drop Kanban Boards
Home.feature1Desc: Simple and ultimate secure login using Email OTP directly to your inbox.
Home.feature2Desc: Manage tasks with Drag & Drop using @dnd-kit, moving cards seamlessly.
Home.feature3Desc: Write task details and format them fully with WYSIWYG using Tiptap.
Home.feature4Desc: Table view for all tasks along with Archive and Trash storage systems.
Home.feature5Desc: Server-side CRUD operations without needing separate API Endpoints.
Home.feature6Desc: Control all devices logged in. Check and force a logout remotely at any time.
Home.techDescription: Using the best tools in their respective areas for an excellent Developer Experience.
Home.ctaDescription: Sign up for free and start building your Kanban Board today.

KanbanBoard.title: Kanban Board
KanbanBoard.description: Manage and track all task statuses

toast.errorTryAgain: An error occurred, please try again.
toast.hideSuccessDesc: "{title}" has been hidden from the board.
toast.showSuccessDesc: "{title}" will now be shown on the board.
toast.reorderErrorDesc: An error occurred while reordering cards.

KanbanList.title: Task List
KanbanList.description: View and manage all tasks in tabular format

ArchiveList.title: Archive
ArchiveList.description: Archived tasks will be kept here. You can restore them anytime.
ArchiveList.emptyStateDesc: When you archive a task, it will be stored here instead of showing on the Board

actions.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to move "{title}" to trash?

toast.restoreSuccessDesc: "{title}" has been restored to the Board
toast.errorTryAgain: An error occurred, please try again

RecurringList.title: Recurring Tasks
RecurringList.description: Manage automatically created tasks such as monthly or weekly tasks.
RecurringList.emptyStateDesc: Create a recurring task to have the system automatically create tasks on schedule
RecurringList.noResults: No recurring tasks matching the search

actions.deleteDesc: "{title}" will be permanently deleted, but already created tasks will not be affected.

toast.statusActiveDesc: "{title}" will continue creating tasks on schedule
toast.statusPausedDesc: "{title}" will not create tasks until activated again

TrashList.title: Trash
TrashList.description: Deleted tasks will be here. You can restore or permanently delete them.
TrashList.emptyStateDesc: When you delete a task from Board or List, it will be moved here.

actions.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.

toast.restoreSuccessDesc: "{title}" has been restored to the Board
toast.errorTryAgain: An error occurred, please try again

TaskDialog.deleteDescription: This task will be moved to the trash. You can restore it later.

ReportDashboard.title: Reports & Statistics
ReportDashboard.description: Summary of work performance and time spent (calculated from totalWorkTime)

timeBreakdown.title: Work Time Details (Per Task)
timeBreakdown.description: Tasks with totalWorkTime greater than 0, sorted by time spent
timeBreakdown.emptyState: No tasks with recorded work time (totalWorkTime = 0)

ProfileSidebar.emailVerifiedDesc: Your account is secure and fully protected.
ProfileSidebar.emailNotVerifiedDesc: Please verify your email address for better security.

ProfilePage.title: Account Settings
ProfilePage.description: Manage your personal information, profile picture, and account-related settings.

form.title: Edit Personal Information
form.description: Update your personal information so your colleagues can know you better.
form.avatarDescription: We recommend using a square image, at least 256x256 px for clarity.
form.emailHelp: Email is used for login and cannot be changed.
form.avatarUrlHelp: If you have a public image URL, you can enter it here to update instead of uploading.

toast.updateSuccess: Profile updated successfully! Your data has been saved.
toast.updateError: An error occurred while updating your profile.

SecurityPage.title: Password & Security
SecurityPage.description: Manage your password and verify account security to prevent unauthorized access.

emailVerification.title: Email Verification Status
emailVerification.notVerifiedDesc: Email verification helps secure your account and enables password recovery if forgotten.
emailVerification.verifiedDesc: Your account is secure and verified. If you encounter any issues, you can access additional help from the settings menu.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Please make sure your new password is at least 8 characters long and hard to guess.
changePassword.securityAdviceDesc: Changing your password may sign you out from all other devices you have logged in to, for account security.

toast.verificationSent: Verification link sent! Please check your inbox.
toast.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
toast.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters long.
toast.passwordChangeError: An error occurred while changing your password.
toast.currentPasswordWrong: Current password is incorrect or an error occurred.

SessionsPage.title: Devices & Sessions
SessionsPage.description: Review and manage devices that are currently logged in to your account.

sessionList.title: All Active Sessions
sessionList.description: If you see an unfamiliar device, please click Sign Out and change your password.

SessionsPage.footer: Clicking "Sign out this device" will disconnect the device immediately. That device will need to log in again.

toast.fetchError: Unable to fetch logged-in device data.
toast.revokeError: An error occurred while removing the session.

frequency.title: Frequency Settings
frequency.dayOfMonthHint: (if the month doesn't have this day, the last day of the month will be used)
frequency.advanceDaysHint: days before due date (0 = create on due day)

deleteDialog.title: Delete this recurring task?
deleteDialog.description: This template will be permanently deleted, but tasks already created will not be affected.

SettingDashboard.title: Settings
SettingDashboard.description: Manage categories, board preferences, notifications, and data.

categories.title: Category Management
categories.description: Create, edit, or delete categories and choose which ones are included in reports.
categories.emptyState: No categories yet. Click "Add Category" to create one.

form.name: Category Name
form.includeInReportDesc: This category will be included in report calculations.

addDialog.title: Add Category
addDialog.description: Create a new category for organizing your tasks.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this category?
deleteDialog.description: "{name}" will be permanently deleted. Tasks using this category will not be affected.

board.title: Board Display
board.description: Customize how the Kanban board looks and behaves.
board.defaultColumnDesc: New tasks will be created in this column by default.
board.showProgressDesc: Display the progress bar on task cards.
board.showDueDateDesc: Display the due date on task cards.
board.showAvatarsDesc: Display assigned member avatars on task cards.
board.showSubtasksDesc: Display the number of subtasks on task cards.
board.enableDragDropDesc: Allow reordering tasks by dragging cards between columns.

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.description: Choose which notifications you want to receive.
notifications.dueDateReminderDesc: Get notified before a task's due date.
notifications.overdueAlertDesc: Get notified when a task is overdue.
notifications.statusChangeDesc: Get notified when a task's status changes.
notifications.reminderDaysDesc: How many days before the due date to send a reminder.

data.title: Data Management
data.description: Configure trash retention and manage your data.
data.autoDeleteTrashDesc: Automatically permanently delete items in trash after a period.
data.dangerZoneDesc: These actions are irreversible. Please proceed with caution.

toast.mockOnly: This is a mock-up only. No data was changed.
